name_cn:
Genuine leather
New version gold logo, pale pear green
Includes long shoulder strap
Mini Nappa leather Flamenco Clutch
Model 11050S
23.9-9-18cm
Released in the 1970s, the Flamenco Clutch features a drawstring closure and the iconic twisted knot. This mini version is made of Nappa leather.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Removable and adjustable shoulder strap
Subtle magnetic closure
Gold suede lining
LOEWE gold or silver stamping
